title: Lifeless.jar
description: My very first ARG horror mod so expect some bugs allong the way. Lifeless.jar is a Paranormal mod that was described as a girl trapped in the game.
body:
![Lifeless.jar Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33853def39c4caca03c5fc90e9222f9e1a06c34a.png)

What if someone was trapped inside minecraft well **the answer is clear**.
Lifeless.jar is a ARG Horror mod made specifically to keep you on edge.

Rules:
No mod that adds a minimap. This will ruin the moments
No Multiplayer! only singleplayer. Will break the system of my mod.
Dont leave your base unintended. >:)
Never Try and steal codes from lifeless. I dont like that.
Never use Essential mod. This could impact the Multiplayer and Singleplayer.
Be alone.

Inspirations:

The broken script,

Inside the system,

Split self,

Nomoon.jar,

Cryptid.


**Entities:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Lucy
![Lucy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7bba0a8d8fb03a6df2f7a6061ba2271ac16d366.png)


She was the main Tagonist of the whole arg. As soon as you get cobblestone Lucy will join the game with the server message "Lucy joins the game." You can interact with her just like null from the broken script but different. She can shift reality, Breaks minecraft codes, setting your house a blaze, builds structures, manipulate pigs, manipulate cows, manipulate sheeps, Can whipe out your world, strikes lightning, manipulate the world around her and messes with the codes.

Lore:
In the lore she used to be a christian girl and was only 8 years old. She loves to attend church to bless her soul. Back in the 2013 She loves to play minecraft with her friends Colynxx, Iron_Gro75, Adam24 and ReneRandom12 and made her own clan called "Flower bloom Clan". in 2015 She was murdered by someone inside her bedroom and her soul ended up inside minecraft. She wanted to take revenge and become more demonic and unholy. She took her own friends and turned them into something horrifying just to take revenge and repent someones sins.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Iron_Gro75
![Iron_Gro75](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03286f6a9c6ece1a7925bfc1140823c85003ea10.png)

A player by the name Iron_Gro75 can appear at night. She can potentualy look at you in any far distance. Appon getting to close to her could crash your current instinct of minecraft. it will dissapear after that. Iron_Gro75 Appears to be a photo negative skin with dark void covering her.

Iron_Gro75 Was a part of LucY's Clan member "Flower bloom Clan" but she was taken by Lucy in 2015 after lucy has died.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
Missing_Texture_Guy.name
![Missing_Texture_Guy.name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d16e04f7acd04e97515087b234494b7bfcadbe3.png)

An entity by the name Missing_Texture_Guy.name was byfar the most scaryest anomaly ever made. When spotted he will go towards you in a slow pase. Appon going near him he will dissapear follow by title popping up, World changed to noon and music of what sounds like distorted minecraft disc cat. After a while it will turn back to normal night.

He used to be the player name Boxin72 but was captured by lucy and turned his skin into missing texture.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Skullboy64
![Skullboy64](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48881eaace05bffb6cb1212f5a9daf01a2cf6575.png)

Skullboy64 was a player entity that stalks the caves. appon seeing you it will chase you not hurting you but turn into something much worse than hurting you. Going near Skullboy will turn into Intergrator with a loud roar. Just like Circuit from the broken script he will chase after you follow by glitches of demonic images like what you see from the conjuring.

It is still being worked on.

Skullboy64 Was a part of Lucy's Clan member "Flower bloom Clan" but he was killed by Lucy in 2015 after Iron_Gro75 passed.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

ReneRandom12
![ReneRandom12](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a46ec30547371de8d34d524c312f81ea0c8f6d7.png)

Appears to be deformed. ReneRandom12 Was a chase entity that destroys your health appon contact. Can appear in fake cows. When approaching one its either too late or regret.

ReneRandom12 Was a part of Lucy's Clan member "Flower bloom Clan" but he was killed by Intergrator in 2016 after Boxin72 met his end.
</details>



This horror mod has a Dimension but wont tell you for spoilers.

This mod has a bossfight that was still in developement right now as it has only 3 attacks at 
random.

There isnt any wiki fandom about this because the email on the fandom is broken.
